description_long: This bollard is sculpted in the form of two abstract human figures embracing, with smooth, flowing contours and a rounded, organic silhouette. The figures are fused together, standing upright on a circular base, and their forms are simplified with minimal facial or anatomical detail. The surface appears to be made of weathered stone or concrete, exhibiting a mottled gray coloration with subtle variations and some signs of aging or patina. The overall shape is slender and vertical, with the arms of the figures wrapping around each other, creating a sense of unity and strength. The top of the bollard is rounded, following the contours of the figures' heads, while the base is flat and stable for secure placement. This artistic design would serve both as a functional barrier and a decorative element in an urban environment.
description: A sculpted bollard depicting two abstract human figures embracing, with a smooth, weathered stone surface and a rounded top on a flat circular base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved back and one arm of the embracing figures, highlighting the smooth, flowing contours.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying the faces and arms of the two figures closely intertwined, emphasizing the embrace.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the back of the figures and the rounded shape of the heads, with minimal detail.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the figures' arms wrapped around each other and the slender profile of the bollard.
